description: Replace the devbox content contract (18-name devboxPrograms allowlist + four !machine.features.devbox denylists + workstation import gating) with a content-feature seam. Content features (dev, shell, ai, writing, media, network, keyboard, music, gaming) become resolved home options; the host list stays the concise input; hostMachine generates a home features module from the content-feature registry; devbox policy mkForces the registry-complement off. machine.features.devbox then gates only VM structure. Domain recorded in CONTEXT.md. Wrinkle A: workstation imports become unconditional + self-gate via mkIf on config.features.<f>.enable.
title: Collapse devbox↔workstation split into a content-feature seam
